data.Patient_Summary: Female patient born on January 27, 2094, has a history of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with multiple flare-ups. Currently management includes immunosuppressants. Looking for clinical trials related to new SLE therapies.
data.summary: Female patient born on January 27, 2094, has a history of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE)...

Trials.Relevance_Reasoning: The patient has a confirmed history of systemic lupus erythematosus which matches the target population for this trial focused on SLE drug efficacy.
Trials.Eligibility_Reasoning: The patient meets the primary inclusion criterion of having a documented diagnosis of SLE for at least 6 months.

inclusion.LLM_Reasoning: The patient has been diagnosed with systemic lupus erythematosus as documented in their history.
Patient age is within the required range of 18 to 75 years.

exclusion.LLM_Reasoning: The patient does not have a history of major organ transplant, which would be an exclusionary factor.

summary: Female patient with history of Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE)
